step_rationale: Adipokine dysregulated in AMI; cardioprotective endothelial signaling; primarily systemic/hemodynamic axis.
mechanism: Apelin dysregulation in acute MI reflects endothelial dysfunction but acts primarily on systemic hemodynamic recovery.

references.title: Adipokines and endothelial dysfunction in acute myocardial infarction and the risk of recurrent cardiovascular events.
